title: Quantity Surveyor
description: Parsons Corporation is recruiting a Quantity Surveyor to support major infrastructure projects in Riyadh under the Vision 2030 programme. You will prepare cost estimates, manage subcontractor payments, and ensure value engineering.
responsibilities: Prepare Bills of Quantities (BOQ), cost plans, and tender documentation.
Manage subcontractor measurement, valuation, and payment certification.
Assess and negotiate variation orders and change requests.
Perform cost monitoring, forecasting, and final account preparation.
Liaise with project managers, designers, and client quantity surveyors.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Quantity Surveying, Civil Engineering, or Construction Management.
Minimum 5 years of QS experience on infrastructure or building projects.
Membership of RICS or CIQS is preferred.
Proficiency in CostX, Candy, or HCSS cost management software.
Experience on Saudi Vision 2030 projects is a significant advantage.

title: Electrical Engineer – Power Distribution
description: Saudi Electricity Company (SEC) is hiring Electrical Engineers to design and oversee medium and high voltage power distribution networks across the Kingdom.
responsibilities: Design HV/MV power distribution systems (33kV, 132kV, 380kV).
Review and approve single-line diagrams, protection schemes, and cable routing designs.
Oversee construction and commissioning of substations and distribution lines.
Perform load flow, short-circuit, and protection coordination studies.
Manage interfaces with EPC contractors and equipment vendors.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Electrical Power Engineering.
4+ years in HV/MV power system design or operation.
Proficiency in ETAP, DIgSILENT PowerFactory, or PSS/E software.
Knowledge of IEC standards for switchgear, transformers, and protection.
Saudi Council of Engineers (SCE) registration required.

title: Commissioning Engineer – Oil & Gas
description: Wood Group is seeking a Commissioning Engineer to lead pre-commissioning and commissioning activities for upstream and midstream oil & gas facilities in Abu Dhabi.
responsibilities: Develop commissioning plans, procedures, and punch-list management systems.
Lead and execute mechanical completion, pre-commissioning, and commissioning activities.
Oversee completions management and systems handover to operations.
Coordinate with discipline leads (mechanical, instrument, electrical) during commissioning.
Participate in start-up and performance testing of process equipment.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical, Chemical, or Process Engineering.
Minimum 8 years of commissioning experience in oil & gas or petrochemical projects.
Proficiency in Completions Management Software (ICAPS, Conject, or equivalent).
Experience with ADNOC or international IOC project standards.
BOSIET offshore survival certificate preferred.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Ooredoo Group is hiring a Cybersecurity Analyst to monitor, detect, and respond to threats across its regional telecoms infrastructure and enterprise IT environment.
responsibilities: Monitor SIEM platforms (Splunk, IBM QRadar) for security events and alerts.
Investigate and triage security incidents using threat intelligence feeds.
Perform vulnerability assessments and coordinate remediation with IT teams.
Develop and maintain security runbooks, playbooks, and incident response plans.
Assist with penetration testing, red team exercises, and SOC operations.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or related field.
CompTIA Security+, CEH, or CISSP certification.
3+ years of SOC/cybersecurity analyst experience.
Hands-on experience with SIEM, EDR, and vulnerability management tools.
Knowledge of MITRE ATT&CK framework and threat hunting techniques.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Microsoft MEA is hiring a Cloud Solutions Architect to lead enterprise Azure migrations and cloud-native design for major clients across the UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar.
responsibilities: Design scalable Azure cloud architectures for enterprise digital transformation projects.
Lead customer workshops on cloud strategy, well-architected frameworks, and security.
Build proof-of-concept solutions and technical proposals.
Support pre-sales, presales engineering, and RFP responses.
Mentor junior architects and upskill client technical teams.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or Software Engineering.
Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ-305).
Minimum 7 years of cloud architecture experience.
Deep expertise in Azure IaaS, PaaS, Kubernetes, and hybrid networking.
Experience in GCC enterprise accounts is a significant advantage.

title: Registered Nurse – ICU
company: King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research Centre
description: King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research Centre (KFSH&RC) is recruiting ICU Registered Nurses to join our world-class critical care team in Riyadh. Tax-free salary plus accommodation, flights, and healthcare.
responsibilities: Provide high-quality nursing care to critically ill adult ICU patients.
Monitor patients on mechanical ventilation, vasopressors, and invasive monitoring.
Administer IV medications, blood products, and complex infusion therapies.
Collaborate with physicians, intensivists, and multidisciplinary ICU team.
Respond to deteriorating patients and code blue situations.
requirements: Bachelor's or Diploma in Nursing from an accredited programme.
Minimum 2 years of ICU/Critical Care nursing experience.
BLS and ACLS certification required; CCRN is preferred.
SCFHS/MOH registration required; support provided for Saudi licensing.
English fluency required; Arabic is an advantage.

title: Radiographer – MRI & CT
description: Aster DM Healthcare is looking for a qualified Radiographer with experience in MRI and CT imaging to join our diagnostic imaging department in Dubai.
responsibilities: Perform MRI, CT, and X-ray examinations on patients following radiologist protocols.
Ensure accurate patient positioning and image quality.
Administer IV contrast media as prescribed and monitor for reactions.
Maintain imaging equipment and escalate maintenance issues.
Maintain patient safety standards and radiation protection guidelines.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Radiography or Medical Imaging Technology.
Minimum 2 years of MRI/CT radiographer experience.
DHA/DOH license required; support provided for UAE registration.
Experience with Siemens, GE, or Philips MRI and CT systems.
Strong patient communication and attention to detail.

title: Executive Chef
description: Rosewood Riyadh is seeking a talented Executive Chef to lead culinary operations across our fine dining, all-day dining, and banqueting outlets at this ultra-luxury property.
responsibilities: Lead and inspire a team of 60+ chefs across multiple restaurant concepts.
Develop innovative menus that reflect Rosewood's culinary philosophy.
Ensure consistency, presentation standards, and food safety compliance.
Control food cost, wastage, and kitchen operating budgets.
Recruit, train, and mentor culinary team members.
requirements: Culinary arts degree or equivalent professional training.
Minimum 8 years of culinary experience with 3+ years as Executive Chef.
Luxury 5-star hotel or restaurant background required.
Experience in multiple cuisines (Western, Arabic/Levantine, Asian).
HACCP certification and strong leadership skills.

title: Front Office Manager
description: Waldorf Astoria Dubai Palm Jumeirah is seeking a Front Office Manager to oversee all front-of-house operations, ensuring bespoke service for our ultra-luxury guests.
responsibilities: Manage front desk, concierge, and guest services operations.
Lead and coach a team of 35+ front office associates.
Ensure seamless VIP and repeat guest recognition programmes.
Collaborate with Housekeeping, F&B, and Revenue teams on room inventory.
Handle guest escalations and drive service recovery excellence.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Hospitality Management.
Minimum 5 years of front office experience with 2+ years in management.
Opera PMS expertise required.
Fluency in English; Arabic or Russian is a significant advantage.
Experience in luxury Dubai hotel is preferred.

title: HSE Manager – Construction
description: AECOM is hiring an HSE Manager to lead health, safety, and environmental compliance for major infrastructure construction projects in Qatar.
responsibilities: Develop and implement project-specific HSE management plans.
Lead HSE inductions, training programmes, and toolbox talks.
Conduct site inspections, audits, and risk assessments.
Investigate incidents, root cause analyses, and corrective action plans.
Ensure compliance with Qatar HSE regulations and client HSE requirements.
requirements: NEBOSH Diploma in Occupational Health & Safety.
Minimum 8 years of HSE experience in construction or infrastructure.
CMIOSH or similar chartered status preferred.
Experience managing HSE on major GCC infrastructure projects.
Strong leadership, reporting, and stakeholder management skills.

title: Treasury Manager
description: Gulf International Bank (GIB) is recruiting a Treasury Manager to manage the bank's liquidity, funding, and FX hedging activities across GCC markets.
responsibilities: Manage daily liquidity positions, funding gaps, and short-term investment portfolios.
Execute FX hedging, interest rate swaps, and money market transactions.
Prepare liquidity reports and ILAAP documentation for regulatory submission.
Develop and maintain relationships with correspondent banks and counterparties.
Support ALCO meetings with data analysis and treasury management reporting.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, or Banking.
ACI Dealing Certificate or CFA preferred.
Minimum 7 years of treasury experience in a bank or financial institution.
Strong knowledge of GCC Central Bank regulations and Basel III liquidity standards.
Bloomberg and Reuters terminal proficiency required.

title: Senior Procurement Engineer
description: Fluor Corporation is seeking a Senior Procurement Engineer for our FEED and EPC projects in Abu Dhabi, managing equipment and bulk material procurement for upstream oil & gas facilities.
responsibilities: Lead equipment and material procurement for static and rotating equipment.
Prepare technical requisitions, bid packages, and bid evaluations.
Negotiate purchase orders with vendors to achieve best commercial terms.
Manage vendor inspection, expediting, and logistics coordination.
Maintain procurement schedules and track delivery commitments.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical or Chemical Engineering.
Minimum 8 years of procurement engineering experience in oil & gas FEED/EPC.
Knowledge of pressure vessels, heat exchangers, pumps, and compressors.
Experience with SAP MM or Oracle Procurement modules.
Strong negotiation, commercial, and cross-cultural communication skills.

title: Data Scientist
description: First Abu Dhabi Bank (FAB) is hiring a Data Scientist to build predictive models and AI solutions for credit risk, fraud detection, and customer behaviour analytics.
responsibilities: Develop machine learning models for credit risk scoring and fraud detection.
Analyse large banking datasets to identify patterns and business insights.
Deploy models into production using MLflow, Docker, and Azure ML.
Collaborate with business stakeholders to translate requirements into analytical solutions.
Communicate model outputs and business impact to senior leadership.
requirements: Master's degree in Data Science, Statistics, or Computer Science.
3+ years of data science experience in financial services or banking.
Proficiency in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM).
Experience with SQL, Spark, and cloud ML platforms (Azure ML or AWS SageMaker).
Knowledge of credit risk, Basel II/III, or IFRS 9 is a strong plus.

title: General Surgeon
description: Hamad Medical Corporation (HMC), Qatar's premier government healthcare system, is recruiting Consultant General Surgeons for Hamad General Hospital, Doha.
responsibilities: Provide general surgical care including emergency, elective, and laparoscopic procedures.
Lead multidisciplinary surgical team rounds and case conferences.
Perform advanced laparoscopic, colorectal, and hepatobiliary surgery.
Supervise and mentor surgical residents and registrars.
Participate in research, audit, and quality improvement programmes.
requirements: MBBS + FRCS, FACS, FRACS, or equivalent surgical board certification.
Minimum 5 years post-CCT or post-fellowship experience as a general surgery consultant.
Qatar Council for Healthcare Practitioners (QCHP) registration required.
Advanced laparoscopic surgery skills required.
Academic/research background is preferred.

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description: Dubai's Department of Tourism and Commerce Marketing (DTCM) is looking for a Digital Marketing Manager to lead digital campaigns, social media strategy, and influencer marketing promoting Dubai as a global destination.
responsibilities: Develop and execute integrated digital marketing campaigns across SEO, SEM, and social media.
Manage influencer partnerships and content creator programmes.
Analyse campaign performance through Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite, and TikTok Analytics.
Lead the team managing Dubai Tourism's multilingual social media accounts.
Collaborate with regional offices on localised digital marketing strategies.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Digital Media, or Communications.
4+ years of digital marketing experience, preferably in travel, hospitality, or destination marketing.
Google Ads and Meta Blueprint certification.
Strong data analytics skills and experience with marketing automation tools.
Multilingual skills (Arabic, Chinese, or Russian) are highly valued.

title: Maintenance Planner
description: ADNOC Onshore is seeking a Maintenance Planner to develop, optimise, and manage preventive and corrective maintenance plans for onshore oil & gas production facilities.
responsibilities: Develop detailed maintenance plans and work packages using SAP PM.
Schedule preventive maintenance tasks and coordinate with operations teams.
Analyse equipment reliability data and adjust maintenance strategies.
Manage spare parts lists, Bill of Materials (BOM), and maintenance history.
Support turnaround planning and execute shutdown maintenance schedules.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical or Electrical Engineering.
Minimum 5 years of maintenance planning experience in oil & gas.
Proficiency in SAP PM (Plant Maintenance) module.
Knowledge of CMMS, RCM, and reliability-centered maintenance principles.
Experience in ADNOC or major GCC NOC environment preferred.

title: Pharmacist – Clinical
description: Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi is recruiting a Clinical Pharmacist to join our multidisciplinary healthcare team, providing expert pharmaceutical care to complex medical and surgical inpatients.
responsibilities: Conduct medication reconciliation, clinical review, and pharmacokinetic monitoring.
Collaborate with physicians and nurses on drug therapy optimisation.
Provide drug information and pharmacovigilance reporting.
Participate in antimicrobial stewardship and medication safety programmes.
Contribute to clinical pharmacy research and quality improvement projects.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Pharmacy (BPharm/PharmD) from an accredited institution.
Minimum 3 years of clinical pharmacy experience in a hospital setting.
DOH/DHA pharmacy license required; support provided for UAE registration.
Board certification (BCPS, BCCP, or equivalent) is preferred.
Strong clinical pharmacology knowledge and patient communication skills.

title: Spa & Wellness Director
description: Six Senses Zighy Bay Oman is seeking a Spa & Wellness Director to lead our award-winning spa programme, integrating holistic wellbeing, ancient healing, and contemporary treatments.
responsibilities: Lead spa and wellness operations including treatments, fitness, and wellness programmes.
Develop seasonal spa menus, wellness retreats, and signature ritual offerings.
Recruit, train, and inspire a team of 30+ therapists and wellness specialists.
Achieve spa revenue targets and manage operating costs.
Build relationships with wellness brand partners and local healing practitioners.
requirements: Degree in Spa Management, Wellness, or Holistic Health.
Minimum 7 years of spa management experience; 3+ years as Director.
Experience in luxury resort spa is essential; GCC experience preferred.
ITEC, CIDESCO, or CIBTAC therapy certification is an advantage.
Strong operational, business, and people leadership skills.

title: Business Development Manager – Logistics
description: DP World is looking for a Business Development Manager to drive new cargo, port, and logistics solutions sales to enterprise clients across GCC and South Asia trade lanes.
responsibilities: Identify and pursue new business opportunities in freight forwarding, port, and logistics solutions.
Develop and manage a portfolio of enterprise shipping and supply chain clients.
Negotiate long-term contracts and service level agreements.
Collaborate with operations, pricing, and product teams to develop winning proposals.
Represent DP World at trade conferences, industry events, and client meetings.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Business, Logistics, or Supply Chain Management.
Minimum 7 years of BD/sales experience in port, freight, or logistics industry.
Strong network in GCC or South Asia shipping/cargo market.
Excellent negotiation, presentation, and CRM skills.
Proficiency in Salesforce and logistics analytics platforms.

title: Telecom RF Engineer – 5G
description: STC is expanding its 5G network and hiring RF Engineers to plan, optimise, and troubleshoot radio frequency networks across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
responsibilities: Plan, design, and optimise 5G NR and 4G LTE radio networks.
Conduct drive tests, CQT, and network performance benchmarking.
Analyse KPIs and identify root causes for RF-related degradations.
Coordinate with vendors (Ericsson, Nokia, Huawei) on RAN optimisation.
Prepare RF engineering reports, frequency plans, and tilt/power recommendations.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Telecommunications or Electrical Engineering.
3+ years of RF planning and optimisation experience on 4G/5G networks.
Proficiency in Atoll, Planet, or Asset radio planning tools.
Experience with Ericsson OSS or Nokia NetAct is preferred.
CCNA or relevant vendor certification is an advantage.

title: Internal Audit Manager
description: Kuwait Finance House (KFH) is recruiting an Internal Audit Manager to lead risk-based internal audit reviews across banking, treasury, retail, and operations divisions.
responsibilities: Plan and execute risk-based internal audit engagements across all business lines.
Lead a team of 5+ auditors, reviewing audit workpapers and reports.
Assess internal controls, compliance, and risk management effectiveness.
Present audit findings and management action plans to Audit Committee.
Monitor implementation of agreed audit recommendations.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Accounting or Finance; CIA or CISA certification required.
Minimum 7 years of internal or external audit experience in banking.
Knowledge of Islamic banking principles and GCC Central Bank regulations.
Proficiency in audit management software (TeamMate, ACL, or equivalent).
Arabic language skills are essential for this role.

title: Welding Inspector – CSWIP 3.1
description: TechnipFMC is seeking CSWIP 3.1 certified Welding Inspectors for subsea pipeline and topside structural welding activities on offshore Qatar projects.
responsibilities: Inspect and witness welding activities against approved WPS/PQR documentation.
Perform visual and dimensional inspections of weld joints.
Coordinate NDE (UT, RT, MT, PT) testing and interpret results.
Review and accept welder qualification records and continuity logs.
Prepare daily inspection reports and nonconformance reports (NCRs).
requirements: CSWIP 3.1 Welding Inspector certification (mandatory).
Minimum 5 years of welding inspection experience in oil & gas projects.
Knowledge of AWS D1.1, ASME IX, and API 1104 welding codes.
Experience with subsea pipeline or structural steel inspection.
PCN Level 2 in UT or RT is preferred.

title: Brand Manager – Consumer Goods
description: Unilever Gulf is hiring a Brand Manager to lead brand strategy, innovation, and marketing execution for a major home care or personal care brand across GCC markets.
responsibilities: Develop and execute annual brand plans including campaign strategy, media mix, and trade activations.
Manage NPD pipeline, packaging innovation, and launch executions.
Analyse brand health metrics, market share data, and consumer insights.
Collaborate with agency partners on creative development and media planning.
Manage A&P budget and track ROI of marketing investments.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, or Communications; MBA preferred.
Minimum 4 years of brand management experience in FMCG.
Experience in GCC consumer markets is strongly preferred.
Strong commercial acumen, data analysis, and creative thinking skills.
Agency management and budget control experience required.

title: Airport Operations Supervisor
description: Hamad International Airport (HIA) is recruiting an Airport Operations Supervisor to oversee terminal operations, ground handling coordination, and passenger flow management.
responsibilities: Supervise day-to-day terminal operations including passenger processing and ground handler coordination.
Monitor operational KPIs (OTP, queue times, gate utilisation) and take corrective actions.
Liaise with airline representatives, ground handlers, and Qatar CAA on operational matters.
Lead shift briefings and manage a team of 15+ operations agents.
Handle disruption management, emergency procedures, and irregular operations.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Aviation Management, Business, or Engineering.
Minimum 4 years of airport operations experience.
ICAO or IATA airport operations certification is an advantage.
Experience with AODB, CUTE, and CUSS systems.
Strong leadership, problem-solving, and multi-tasking skills.

title: Pediatrician – Outpatient
description: Mediclinic Middle East is seeking a Consultant Paediatrician for outpatient general and subspecialty paediatrics at our Dubai facilities.
responsibilities: Provide general outpatient paediatric consultations for children 0–18 years.
Diagnose and manage common paediatric conditions including respiratory, GI, and developmental issues.
Refer complex cases to appropriate subspecialties within the Mediclinic network.
Perform developmental assessments, vaccination counselling, and well-child visits.
Maintain accurate electronic medical records using the hospital HIS system.
requirements: MBBS + MRCPCH, DCH, ABP, or equivalent paediatric board certification.
Minimum 4 years of post-specialist qualification paediatric experience.
DHA specialist/consultant license required; support provided for UAE registration.
Excellent communication skills with children and parents.
Arabic language skills are a significant advantage.
